subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Sanatorium of Dr. Swingle in Cleveland, 1912-05-06
subcodes.first_line: This is a beautiful city; the climate is pleasant; the views are charming. All the cities of America... Now this American nation is a revered nation, and presents great and deserved
subcodes.subjects: @praise of Western values; culture, @development of capacity and readiness, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
